# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: auth-service
    url: http://auth-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: auth-route
        paths:
          - /auth
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        protocols:
          - http
          - https

  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: user-route
        paths:
          - /users
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        protocols:
          - http
          - https

  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: order-route
        paths:
          - /orders
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        protocols:
          - http
          - https

  - name: inventory-service
    url: http://inventory-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: inventory-route
        paths:
          - /inventory
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        protocols:
          - http
          - https

upstreams:
  - name: auth-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    healthchecks:
      active:
        http_path: /health
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10
          http_failures: 3
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 1
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
    targets:
      - target: auth-service-1:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: auth-service-2:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: user-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    healthchecks:
      active:
        http_path: /health
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10
          http_failures: 3
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 1
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
    targets:
      - target: user-service-1:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: user-service-2:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: order-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    healthchecks:
      active:
        http_path: /health
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10
          http_failures: 3
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 1
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
    targets:
      - target: order-service-1:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: order-service-2:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: inventory-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    healthchecks:
      active:
        http_path: /health
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10
          http_failures: 3
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 1
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
    targets:
      - target: inventory-service-1:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: inventory-service-2:8080
        weight: 100
